jsonLd.title: Pilgrim is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pilgrim! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pilgrim:
Pilgrim is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim!
